project.name: Renovate Config
project.summary: Renovate Config is the shared dependency-update policy consumed by repositories that extend github>SylphxAI/renovate-config.
goals: Provide one default Renovate policy for multi-stack repositories.
Reduce duplicated dependency-update configuration across the organization.
Keep dependency-update behavior predictable, low-noise, and safe for CI capacity.
nonGoals: Own project-specific dependency exceptions, release policies, private registry credentials, or package-manager lockfiles.
Become a general CI/admission policy repository.
Make broad automerge or schedule changes without fleet impact analysis.

owns.name: shared-renovate-policy
owns.description: The default Renovate configuration, stack detection assumptions, grouping, scheduling, automerge defaults, labels, and rate limits.

owns.name: renovate-config-documentation
owns.description: README usage instructions and supported stack documentation for consuming repositories.

doesNotOwn: Consuming repositories' local Renovate overrides, private registry credentials, package-manager lockfiles, or dependency risk decisions.
Application release policies or package publishing workflows.

publicSurfaces.name: Public usage and stack support documentation

forbiddenCouplings: Do not encode project-specific dependency policy in the shared default config.
Do not store secrets, private registry credentials, or repo-specific tokens.
Do not broaden automerge or scheduling behavior without fleet impact analysis.

delivery.deployPath: Main branch changes are consumed by Renovate through github>SylphxAI/renovate-config; no repo-local GitHub Actions workflow is declared at adoption time.
delivery.productionProof: JSON parse validation for default.json, README/config diff review, central project manifest audit, and representative consuming-repo impact analysis for policy changes.

gaps.description: No repo-local workflow validates default.json or consuming-repo examples at adoption time.
